TRAINING MODE • SYNTHETIC DATABASE

NorthBridge Staffing Upload Operations

This is a fake staffing/data-entry job simulator using 1,250 synthetic candidate records. Practice uploading profiles, checking documents, fixing queue errors, and managing a 1,000+ person database.

No real people, no real hiring, no real HR system. Everything stays in your browser.

Today’s fake role

You are the Staffing Database Upload Specialist. Your job is to keep candidate records clean, complete, and ready for recruiters.

Work rule

Never use real personal info. This simulator is only for fake/demo data practice.

Add / Upload Candidate Information

Fake training records only
Training warning: Do not paste real names, real phone numbers, real resumes, real IDs, or real private information into this practice site.

Job Instructions

✓
Goal of the job

Take candidate information from the upload queue and make sure each fake candidate profile is complete, consistent, and ready for recruiter review.

A
Accuracy checklist

Check candidate ID, name, role, city/state, resume status, ID status, background check, drug test, upload status, and notes.

B
When to mark “Needs Fix”

Use this when a record has missing docs, conflicting info, invalid status, or a note that says follow-up is required.

C
When to mark “Complete”

Use this when resume and ID are uploaded, work authorization is clear, and no major queue issue remains.

!
Important privacy rule

This is only a simulation. Never upload or store real candidate information in this website.

0Needs document follow-up
0Cannot complete upload
0Needs human review
